warm_family.note: warm amber tints used for callout/highlight surfaces against the cream base

color.temperature: warm neutrals (stone/cream), cool single-hue blue accent

typography.heading_weight: 300 (light) — large headlines are font-light with tracking-tight
typography.scale: Tailwind default ramp: 0.75 / 0.875 / 1 / 1.125 / 1.25 / 1.5 / 2.25 / 3 / 3.75rem; hero at text-5xl to 6xl
typography.eyebrow_style: JetBrains Mono, uppercase, tracking-wide, muted or primary blue

spacing.density: airy — generous section gaps, roomy card padding
spacing.section_rhythm: consistent large vertical bands, each with mono eyebrow + light headline

layout.max_width: content columns around 42rem (2xl) for text; wider demo panels
layout.structure: hero with product demo window, alternating feature sections, CTA, minimal footer
layout.alignment: mostly centered hero, left-aligned section content

shape.dominant: rounded-full is the most-used radius class — pills everywhere

elevation.philosophy: hairline borders first, shadows second; all shadows soft and low-alpha

motion.reveals: ok-reveal-in: fade + 4px translateY; ok-block-reveal: fade + 7px translateY

components.primary_button: pill, uppercase label, bg primary, white text, lift on hover
components.cards: white on cream, hairline border, soft panel shadow
components.chips_badges: small rounded-full tags; doc/data/code chip color variants
components.product_windows: faux app windows with toolbars, tabs, and timeline UI as hero imagery
components.inputs: rounded-full with inset pill button, ring-2 primary focus states

design_style.mood: calm, crafted, trustworthy — a warm 'paper' take on developer tooling
design_style.personality: understated confidence; open-source ethos signaled through mono type and plain-file metaphors
design_style.genre: modern dev-tool / AI-product landing page (Linear/Vercel lineage) but warm-paper instead of dark
design_style.visual_language: cream paper background + dot grid = engineering notebook; azure blue as the single vivid accent; product UI itself is the hero imagery
design_style.composition: eyebrow, light oversized headline, short declarative subhead, live product demo; repeated per section
design_style.imagery: no photography; real product UI (editor windows, agent chat transcripts, timelines) is the primary imagery, staged over soft dawn-sky mesh-gradient image backdrops (sky blue #b3d4f7 to warm peach #f8e7dd to pale mint — the morning-mist/golden-sun palette as atmosphere); flat crystal-blue #d5e5ff elongated-hexagon shapes with a blurred echo layer flank the CTA; partner-tool logos as static SVGs
design_style.ornamentation: minimal — dot grid texture, hairline rules, occasional warm-amber callout tint, plus atmospheric dawn-sky gradient backdrops and flat crystal-blue hexagon accents reserved for hero/CTA moments
design_style.whitespace_philosophy: generous; whitespace does the separating, borders do the grouping
design_style.copy_voice: short, plain, benefit-led sentences; mono uppercase section labels
design_style.interaction_feel: snappy and physical — quick 120-200ms color transitions, subtle lift/press on buttons

overview.performance_tier: lightweight — CSS/DOM only, no WebGL/Canvas/Three.js detected
overview.composite_notes: Signature effects: (1) dot-grid paper background, (2) soft dawn-sky mesh-gradient image backdrops behind hero and pillar demo boxes (static webp assets: hero-box-background.webp 2696x808, pillar gradients — blue to peach to mint washes), (3) glassmorphic overlay panels (20px backdrop blur, 28px radius, translucent #fffefe2e fill, cool blue shadow) floating over those gradients, (4) staggered fade-up reveals, (5) odometer-style rolling-digit ticker demo, (6) faux multi-agent chat windows cycling between Claude/Cursor/Codex tabs, (7) flat #d5e5ff hexagon SVG shapes with feGaussianBlur echo flanking the CTA.

glassmorphism.details: backdrop-blur 20px, rgba white fill #fffefe2e, 1px card-tinted border, radius 28px, shadow 6px 6px 24px rgba(153,173,205,0.2)

scroll_effects.details: fade + small translateY entrance reveals (4-7px), 300-1400ms, staggered per block

micro_interactions.details: button lift on hover (-2px + shadow), scale-98 press, 120ms hover tint on toolbar buttons

animated_ui_demos.details: rolling-digit ticker (translateY digit strips), tabbed agent-conversation player, animated timeline feed — all DOM/CSS driven

background_gradients.details: static mesh-gradient image assets (webp), not CSS gradients: dawn-sky wash from #b3d4f7 sky blue through #f8e7dd warm peach to pale mint/teal; used behind hero product window and pillar sections; glass panels blur over them

svg_animations.note: SVGs are static logos/icons; Mermaid diagrams rendered in-product demos
